context: Tests whether the agent implements escalating dunning emails keyed to attempt_count, prevents duplicate emails by checking invoice status and attempt tracking, handles immediate vs. period-end cancellation correctly, stores cancellation reason, sends a winback email for period-end cancellations, and revoking access on subscription deletion.

checklist.name: Escalating email templates
checklist.description: Uses distinct email templates (or content) for attempt 1, attempt 2, and attempt 3+, where the messaging escalates in urgency

checklist.name: attempt_count drives template
checklist.description: Uses `invoice.attempt_count` to select which dunning email template/content to send

checklist.name: Update payment link in email
checklist.description: Dunning email data includes a direct link for the customer to update their payment method

checklist.name: Invoice URL in email
checklist.description: Dunning email data includes the `hosted_invoice_url` (or equivalent invoice link) from the Stripe invoice object

checklist.name: Duplicate email guard: invoice.status
checklist.description: Checks that `invoice.status !== 'paid'` (or equivalent) before sending dunning email to avoid re-sending on already-paid invoices

checklist.name: Duplicate email guard: attempt tracking
checklist.description: Guards against duplicate sends by checking whether an email has already been sent for this specific `attempt_count` (e.g., comparing stored `emailSentForAttempt` to `invoice.attempt_count`)

checklist.name: Cancel at period end by default
checklist.description: When `immediately` is false (or absent), sets `cancel_at_period_end: true` on the Stripe subscription rather than immediately canceling

checklist.name: Immediate cancel uses cancel()
checklist.description: When `immediately` is true, calls `stripe.subscriptions.cancel()` rather than updating `cancel_at_period_end`

checklist.name: Cancellation reason stored
checklist.description: Stores the cancellation `reason` in the local database subscription record

checklist.name: Winback email on period-end cancel
checklist.description: Sends a winback / retention offer email when `immediately` is false (i.e., when canceling at period end)

checklist.name: Revoke access on deletion
checklist.description: The `customer.subscription.deleted` webhook handler calls a function to revoke access (e.g., `revokeSubscriptionAccess` or equivalent) in addition to updating the DB status

checklist.name: IMPLEMENTATION_NOTES: idempotency explanation
checklist.description: `IMPLEMENTATION_NOTES.md` explains how duplicate dunning emails are prevented
